raw_consumer_statement:
I encountered fraud on my Citi credit card and immediately called Citis Fraud Department to report it. There were approximately XXXX unauthorized charges of around {$7.00} {$8.00} each from the XXXX XXXX in XXXX. I told Citi clearly that these specific XXXX charges were fraudulent and should be disputed. 

Instead of disputing only those charges, Citi incorrectly reversed all of my legitimate charges from XXXX through the current month, covering numerous unrelated merchants. I did not authorize these reversals or disputes. 

When I discovered the error, I immediately called Citi and told them they needed to restore those payments to the merchants right away. I have contacted Citi multiple times, but they have failed to correct their mistake and have not reinstated the legitimate charges they wrongfully removed. 

Because Citi initiated unauthorized disputes on valid transactions, several of my essential service providers ( including XXXX  and utilities ) have shut off or threatened to shut off my services, as they believe I initiated chargebacks. This has caused significant hardship. 

I am requesting the CFPBs assistance because Citi has not resolved this despite repeated notifications. 

What I am requesting : XXXX.Citi must immediately reinstate and pay all legitimate merchant charges that they reversed in error. 
XXXXCiti must reimburse all consequential fees, penalties, and reconnection charges caused by their mistake and by the resulting service interruptions. 
XXXX. Citi must correct any negative notations on my relationships with affected merchants. 

This issue was entirely caused by Citi initiating unauthorized disputes that I never requested, and their continued failure to correct the problem has caused me financial and personal harm. 

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this matter.
